```python
def rotate_matrix(m):
    n = len(m)
    for layer in range(n // 2):
        first, last = layer, n - layer - 1
        for i in range(first, last):
            top = m[layer][i]
            m[layer][i] = m[-i - 1][layer]
            m[-i - 1][layer] = m[-layer - 1][-i - 1]
            m[-layer - 1][-i - 1] = m[i][-layer - 1]
            m[i][-layer - 1] = top
```
